text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 10.5px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start
font-weight: 700; font-size: 13.5px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: middle

g.text: DNA sequencing costs by platform family, 2001-2026
Notes: Platform values are reagent-only costs from the supplied JSX data. Cost/genome assumes 90 Gb raw sequence for 30x WGS; Moore's Law
halves every 24 months from the 2001 NHGRI baseline. Verify and cite primary sources before publication.
